title: cleidion populifolium
intro: Cleidion populifolium, also known as the Philippine ash or Philippine poplar, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. Cleidion populifolium is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
